title: StrategicRecommendationsOutput
description: Strategic recommendations generated after risk scoring. Each recommendation is a concrete action for a polo, with legal fundamentation, verbatim source quote, and deadline.

action.description: Concrete action to take (e.g. 'Opor embargos de declaração arguindo art. 942 CPC').

fundamentacao.description: Legal and factual justification for why this action is advisable.

evidence_quote.description: Verbatim quote from the source chunk that grounds this recommendation. No paraphrasing.

evidence_chunk_ref.description: Index of the chunk from which evidence_quote was extracted.

deadline_days.description: Days (úteis) to execute this action, when applicable.

deadline_basis.description: Legal basis for the deadline (e.g. 'CPC art. 1.023').

impact.description: Expected strategic impact of executing this action.
